column1: I _____ the letter a week ago and they _____ it yet. (send, not receive)
Ferdinand Magellan _____ the first expedition to sail around the world. (lead)
"Evergreen" plants _____ their leaves in winter. (not drop)
The balalaika _____ often _____ in Russian folk songs. (mention)
A lot of birchbark letters _____ in Novgorod several years ago. (find)
Scientists _____ a lot of birchbark letters in Novgorod several years ago. (find)
Big Ben _____ next to the Houses of Parliament along the River Thames. (stand)
When he entered the room Mrs Carter _____ by the open window. She _____ him. (stand, not see)
When he came we _____ the hall with balloons. (decorate)
Last year we _____ the hall with balloons. (decorate)
